title: 有馬記念の後に・迷走の始まり

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Vodka vs. Daiwa Scarlet—the rivals' last battle of
the year comes to a head!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And Daiwa Scarlet wins! Vodka just couldn't catch
her!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: No way... I can't believe it. I lost...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I've never felt like this after losin' before. That
Scarlet...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. What do you say, Vodka? This is my win,
hands down!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Now you have to admit it, don't you? Wasn't I
amazing?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Yeah. You were.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
Wh-what? That was honest. Where's your usual
bravado?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: You won... because you're stronger.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
You never stopped runnin' towards your goal.
Me, on the other hand... Well, I lost my way.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
And that's why I lost. This is the only way it could
have ended.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Sorry ya have to see me like this. I'm not bein'
myself right now.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Anyway, I'm gonna go...

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Wait, where are you going?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
To find my ideal way to run. There's no way I'll
ever be able to stand in front of you again until I
find it.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: ...Peace out.

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text: Vodka...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Vodka makes no motion to go home today...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: This was a huge loss, Trainer...
choice_data_list: Because the difference in skill was too great?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
No, that's not it... It's that I'm not even
disappointed.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
In fact, I kinda get it. It was obvious I was gonna
lose.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: So... I'll have to try again. Next year.
choice_data_list: So you can try to find your true, cool self?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: That's right. I'm glad I ran the Arima Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I can't run if I can't see coolness. I can't win. Even
I did somehow win, it wouldn't mean anything
without that sensation.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I've realized that now. So I really need to find
what I'm looking for. Together, with you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems that as Vodka's goals lose their allure,
her running suffers.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
So, which race should we shoot for first next
year? I wanna start over.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Start over, huh? Looks like Vodka really wants to
find that missing piece of her running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In that case, instead of running longer races and
getting caught up in tactics, a shorter race where
Vodka can just concentrate on running would be
best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In that case...
choice_data_list: How about the Victoria Mile in the spring?

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The Victoria Mile... A no-tricks race of
straight-up speed.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
All right, let's do that. Until then, what do you say
to joining me for some aimless touring?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There are different periods to the Twinkle Series,
including a time to run without thinking of
anything else, and a time for soul-searching.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka doesn't even try to run away. She plunges
straight into this season of uncertainty.
